headlines.headline: Ixenix Technologies reports 8% decline in operating income

sentiment.reasoning: An 8% decline in operating income directly reflects reduced profitability and operational efficiency.

headlines.headline: Ixenix Technologies secures $50M contract with a leading cloud platform

sentiment.reasoning: Securing a $50M contract provides a clear, positive boost to revenue and market confidence.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
